title: Jeff Dean
text:
Jeffrey Adgate Dean (born July 23, 1968) is an American computer scientist and software engineer. Since 2018, he has been the lead of Google AI. Early life and education · Career · Philanthropy · Publications

Jeffrey Adgate
Dean (born July 23, 1968) is an American computer scientist and software engineer . Since 2018, he has been the lead of Google AI . [ 1 ] He was appointed Google 's chief scientist in 2023 after the merger of DeepMind and Google Brain into Google DeepMind . [ 2 ]
Education [ edit ]
Dean received a B.S., summa cum laude , from the University of Minnesota in computer science and economics in 1990.

American computer scientist and software engineer

**Jeffrey Adgate** **Dean** (born July 23, 1968) is an American computer scientist and software engineer . Since 2018, he has been the lead of Google AI . <sup>[[ 1 ]]()</sup> He was appointed Google 's chief scientist in 2023 after the merger of DeepMind and Google Brain into Google DeepMind . <sup>[[ 2 ]](:3-2)</sup>
